sections.name: AntMatutinumM
lines: O Holy Mother of God * all we who dwell in you are in gladness.;;86

sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: You are a garden enclosed, O Mother of God, a garden enclosed, a fountain sealed up: arise quickly my love and come.

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. You are loved by the Lord above health and all beauty, and you are worthy of being called the Queen of heaven,
* the choirs of angels, our fellow citizens and companions, rejoice.
V. For you alone have pleased Christ and are without comparison among women.
R. The choirs of angels, our fellow citizens and companions, rejoice.
V. Glory be to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Ghost.
R. The choirs of angels, our fellow citizens and companions, rejoice.

sections.name: Lectio7
lines: @Sancti/08-15:Lectio6:s/, and thus.*/./s

sections.name: Lectio8
lines: @Sancti/08-15:Lectio6:s/.*, and thus/And thus/s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. She is the most beautiful among the daughters of Jerusalem, as you have seen her full of charity and love
* In the bed and in the spice garden.
V. Who is this that comes up from the desert, flowing with delights.
R. In the bed and in the spice garden.

sections.name: Lectio9
lines: @Sancti/08-15:Lectio7:s/ Indeed .*//s

sections.name: Lectio10
lines: @Sancti/08-15:Lectio7:s/.* Indeed /Indeed /s

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. Today the Virgin Mary ascends to heaven, rejoice
* Because she reigns with Christ forever.
V. Mary is assumed into heaven. the angels rejoice, blessing and praising the Lord.
R. Because she reigns with Christ forever.
